Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs, Strike Costs And Reduce Costs
Off Calendar Jul-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Noah W. Kanter of Murray and Associates, 673-0555, appearing for plaintiff and moving party
Stacey Lucas of the City Attorney's Office, 554-3949, appearing for defendant and opposing party

The Court made a personal disclosure, and there being no objections the matter was argued. The Court denied in part and granted in part PLAINTIFF E.R. BALINTON'S Motion To Tax Costs, Strike Costs And Reduce Costs. The motion was granted as to videotaping costs of $1947.50. Plaintiff's objection to late filed evidence was overruled. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/DM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
